subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! O My leaf! Thy letter hath reached Us. We beseech God, blessed and exalted be He, to ordain for thee that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی یا ورقتی نامه ات رسید نسئل الله تبارک و تعالی ان یقدر لک ما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
